name: Passionflower
summary: Passionflower is used for mild mental stress and sleep tension; evidence is traditional/emerging rather than strong.
description: Traditional mild-stress and sleep support with cautious evidence framing.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Passiflora incarnata in Neuropsychiatric Disorders-A Systematic Review

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 500 mg oral Passiflora incarnata used 90 minutes before surgery in a preoperative anxiety RCT

claimMap.claim: Passionflower may reduce anxiety symptoms in some clinical contexts; effects in mild anxiety are less evident.
claimMap.notes: Passionflower may reduce anxiety symptoms in some clinical contexts; effects in mild anxiety are less evident.
